chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.S-571 of 2023 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For order on office objection 2.For hg of CMA No.4444/2023 3.For hg of main case 12.08.2024. Mr. Khawaja Saif-ul-Islam, advocate alongwith legal heir No. 3, namely, Muhammad Ahsan Durrani. Respondent No.1, Atif Muhammad Baig is present in person. Mr. Muhammad Farooq, advocate for NADRA. Mr. Meeran Muhammad Shah, Addl. Advocate General. Legal heir No. 3 of Mst. Naheed Saleem Durrani is present submits that he is tenant of the subject demised premises bearing Flat No.6, 2nd Floor, Rehman Mansion, Plot No.273/2, A.M. Saddar, Karachi and if sufficient time is given to him for vacating to the said flat, he would vacate the same without further orders. Respondent No. 1 has agreed to give him five months which he has accepted to be sufficient time for vacating the demised premises. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of along with pending application in the terms that petitioner, subject to payment of rent, will remain in the demised premises for five months from today and after five months, should vacate the demised premises without further orders. JUDGE HANIF
